mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in RSAFS signals resilient household demand and stronger near-term corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:RSAFS
fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 447686 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the walk-forward 20-day return Rank IC for 3-month RSAFS momentum is below 0.03 in every rolling 3-year window or if high-momentum months do not outperform low-momentum months.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in UNRATE of more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months signals weakening labor income and recession-risk repricing, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:UNRATE
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 5.1 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of out-of-sample cases or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains below 0.25% while CPIAUCSL inflation is contained, discount-rate pressure stays low without an inflation shock, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
series:CPIAUCSL
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.14 as of t-1mo
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 237.566 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if low-rate contained-inflation triggered periods do not deliver higher 60-day returns than other periods, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month change in INDPRO signals contraction in cyclical production and weaker operating leverage, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:INDPRO
fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value was 107.0793 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if after INDPRO 3-month growth crosses below zero, S&P 500 20-day returns are positive in more than 60% of triggered observations or are not below baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: HOUST above 1000 with positive 6-month momentum signals expanding construction activity and durable-goods demand, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above 1000 and 6-month percent change > 0
evidence_refs: series:HOUST
fact:HOUST latest snapshot value was 1126.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered housing-expansion observations fail to produce positive 60-day returns more often than 50% or if their mean return is not above the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Strong PAYEMS growth combined with a stable or falling UNRATE signals expanding aggregate labor income without labor-market deterioration, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS 3-month average change > 150 and UNRATE 3-month change <= 0
evidence_refs: series:PAYEMS
series:UNRATE
fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value was 142371.0 as of t-1mo
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value was 5.1 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-UNRATE condition has no positive incremental explanatory power versus PAYEMS alone, or if triggered 20-day returns are not above baseline in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in FEDFUNDS after an extended low-rate period signals monetary tightening and higher discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: series:FEDFUNDS
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value was 0.14 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS increases are followed by positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if triggered mean returns are not below unconditional 5-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPIAUCSL growth combined with flat or falling RSAFS signals margin pressure and weaker real consumption, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth > 3% and RSAFS 3-month percent change <= 0
evidence_refs: series:CPIAUCSL
series:RSAFS
fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value was 237.566 as of t-1mo
fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value was 447686.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-RSAFS interaction does not predict lower 60-day returns than either proxy alone, or if triggered instances have nonnegative average forward returns out of sample.
